ul.li: Thieves: Stealing attempts to increment top via CAS.

div.p: Data Range: Elements at [top, bottom-1] Owner (Producer):

ul.li: push(): Write to [3], StoreStore Barrier, bottom = 4
pop(): bottom = 2, LoadLoad/LoadStore, read Task C Thief (Consumer):

div.p: Exactly one item remains. Both pop() (owner) and steal() (thief) compete.

ol.li: Thief Protocol: Atomic read top, read bottom, read data, then CAS(top, t, t+1).
Owner Protocol: bottom--. If top == bottom, perform CAS(top, t, t+1) to claim or reset.
Barrier: SeqCst fence required between bottom-- and top read.

ul.li: Owner Write: Only modifies bottom. Stays in L1/L2 cache locally.
Thief Contention: Compete for top only.
Padding: Ensures top and bottom reside on different 64-byte lines.

g.text: if t < b: CAS(top, t, t+1)
